title: Ad Astra :Tools
description: Addon for "Ad Astra" that adds new tools and other things.
body:
# ❓What does the mod do?
 **Ad Astra: Tools** is addon which adds desh, Steel, Ostrum and Calorite tools and armor!
Thats all **yet...**

# ✨Features :
- Desh armor
- Ostrum armor
- Calorite armor
- Desherite armor
- Desh tools
- Ostrum tools
- Calorite tools
- Steel tools
- **In the new update 2.0 there is new metal "Centaur"**

**❗Centaur can be found in overworld and smelted to centaur ingot, with centaur ingot you
can craft new tools.**
_Centaur tools are a something between iron and diamond tools but it have a good fire resistant._

# ➕Extra info
- Mod is already done, i am waiting for new version of Ad Astra and starting make new mod :)

- Mod will be bigger!

Thanks to bupka for a few textures!
